search.useMyCurrentLocation: Yi amfani da wurina na yanzu

home.tagline: Nemo birni ko yi amfani da wurinka don cikakken hasashen yanayi.

insights.title: Binciken Yanayi na Kullum
insights.mainText: Tsare-tsare bisa yanayi ya fi dogaro idan ka haɗa sigina da yawa maimakon mayar da hankali kan lamba ɗaya kawai. Zazzabi shine tushe, amma jin daɗi da haɗari galibi suna fitowa daga iska, danshi, ruwan sama, da saurin canje-canje a cikin yini.
insights.windText: Iska mai ƙarfi tana sa ranar sanyi ta ji daɗin sanyi kuma tana iya haɓaka asarar zafin jiki yayin tafiya.
insights.humidityText: Iska mai nauyi tana hana gumi ƙafewa, wanda ke sa kwanakin zafi su zama masu gajiyarwa kuma suna buƙatar ƙarin ruwa.
insights.rainTitle: Lokacin ruwan sama ya fi yawansa mahimmanci:
insights.rainText: Ko da ɗan gajeren ruwan sama a lokacin da bai dace ba zai iya ɓata tsare-tsarenka; duba hasashen sa'a-sa'a.
insights.dressText: Yadi na ciki mai sauƙi tare da jaket mai hana iska da ruwa ya fi jin daɗi da daidaitawa fiye da tufa ɗaya mai kauri.
insights.tip: Shawara: Ziyarci jagororin yanayi don ƙarin bayani game da (Danshi, Yadda ake Ji, UV Index da amincin walƙiya).

sections.clickGetAdviceHint: Danna 'Samun Shawara' a sama don shawarwarin tufafi da ayyuka bisa hasashen yanzu.

disclaimer.aiGenerated: Abun ciki da AI ta ƙirƙira. Zai iya ƙunshi kurakurai; bincika don yanke shawara masu mahimmanci.

chat.title: Mataimakin AtmosMind
chat.welcome: Sannu! Ni ne mataimakin ku na AtmosMind. Yaya zan iya taimaka muku yau?
chat.errorFallback: Yi haƙuri, an kasa samun amsa. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
chat.tooltipWear: Me zan sa da kyau yau?

footer.brandTagline: Dandalin yanayi mai wayo wanda AI ke ƙarfafawa.

about.seoTitle: Game da Mu - AtmosMind - Makomar Yanayi da AI
about.seoDescription: Gano yadda AtmosMind ke haɗa AI da bayanan yanayi na ainihin-lokaci don hasashen da aka dogara a rayuwar yau da kullun.
about.title: Game da Mu
about.mainParagraph: A AtmosMind, muna sake fasalin ƙwarewarku ta yanayi. AtmosMind ba kawai aikace-aikace na yau da kullun ba ne; shi ne mai ba ku shawara na yanayi na sirri wanda AI ke ƙarfafawa. Yi wa mataimakinmu na AI tambayoyi dalla-dalla game da kowane wuri a duniya kuma sami shawarwarin da suka dace da ku. Ko kuna shirya tafiya ko kawai kuna son sani, AtmosMind yana ba da fahimtar da ake buƙata don yanke shawara masu inganci.
about.qa1A: AtmosMind dandalin yanayi ne na AI wanda ke haɗa bayanan ainihin-lokaci tare da shawarwari masu amfani don tsara rayuwar yau da kullun.
about.qa2Q: Ta yaya AI ke taimakawa a AtmosMind?
about.qa2A: AtmosMind yana amfani da AI don fassara yanayin yanayi da canza danyen bayanai zuwa shawarwari masu amfani.
about.qa3Q: Wane ne ya kamata ya yi amfani da AtmosMind?
about.qa3A: An tsara shi don matafiya, masu tafiya zuwa aiki, da duk wanda ke buƙatar jagorar yanayi abin dogaro.
about.qa4Q: Daga ina bayanan yanayi suke zuwa?
about.qa4A: AtmosMind yana haɗi zuwa amintattun masu samar da bayanai kuma yana gabatar da su ta hanyar haɗin AI mai sauƙi.

privacy.seoDescription: Karanta manufofin sirri na AtmosMind, gami da tattara bayanai, amfani, da ƙa'idodin tsaro.
privacy.title: Manufar Sirri
privacy.adsCookiesBody1: AtmosMind na iya nuna tallace-tallace da Google AdSense ke sarrafawa. Google da abokan hulɗa na iya amfani da kukiyoyi don keɓancewa da auna tallace-tallace.
privacy.adsCookiesBody2: Dangane da wurin ku, ana iya neman izinin ku don kukiyoyin zaɓi. Kuna iya sarrafa wannan daga saitunan burauzar ku.
privacy.introductionBody: Wannan manufar tana bayyana yadda AtmosMind ke tattarawa, amfani, da kare bayananku yayin amfani da dandalin mu.
privacy.collectBody: Za mu iya aiwatar da waɗannan nau'ikan bayanai:
privacy.collectItem1: Tarihin bincike da tambayoyin yanayi da aka shigar a cikin aikace-aikacen.
privacy.collectItem2: Bayanan wuri da ake amfani da su don samar da hasashen daidai.
privacy.collectItem3: Bayanan amfani na fasaha kamar nau'in na'ura da cikakkun bayanai na burauza.
privacy.usageBody: Muna amfani da bayanai don sarrafa dandalin da samar da jagorar AI.
privacy.usageItem1: Samar da ingantaccen abun ciki na yanayi da shawarwarin gida.
privacy.usageItem2: Inganta ingancin fahimtar da AI ke ƙirƙira.
privacy.usageItem3: Sa ido kan aiki da hana rashin amfani.
privacy.securityBody: AtmosMind yana amfani da matakan tsaro na yau da kullun da aka ƙera don kare bayanai.
privacy.thirdPartyBody: AtmosMind yana dogara ga APIs na waje waɗanda ke aiki ƙarƙashin sharuɗɗan nasu.
privacy.rightsBody: Kuna iya samun haƙƙin shiga, gyara, ko share bayanan ku na sirri.

terms.seoDescription: Karanta sharuɗɗan sabis na AtmosMind gami da rashin alhakin AI.
terms.title: Sharuɗɗan Sabis
terms.intro: Waɗannan sharuɗɗan suna tafiyar da amfanin ku na AtmosMind. Ta amfani da sabis ɗin, kun yarda da waɗannan sharuɗɗan.
terms.serviceBody: AtmosMind yana samar da dashboard na yanayi da fahimtar AI don dalilai na gabaɗaya na bayanai.
terms.aiTitle: Abun ciki da AI Ta Ƙirƙira
terms.aiBody: Wasu abun ciki AI ce ta ƙirƙira. Sakamakon bazai zama daidai ba; tabbatar da bayanai kafin yanke shawara.
terms.noWarrantyBody: Ana ba da sabis ɗin 'kamar yadda yake' ba tare da kowane garanti na daidaito ba.
terms.limitationBody: A iyakar abin da doka ta yarda, AtmosMind ba zai ɗauki alhakin lalacewar kai tsaye ba.
terms.changesBody: Za mu iya sabunta waɗannan sharuɗɗan lokaci zuwa lokaci. Ci gaba da amfani yana nufin yarda da sharuɗɗan.

cookies.seoDescription: Koyi yadda AtmosMind ke amfani da kukiyoyi don bincike da talla.
cookies.title: Manufar Kuki
cookies.whatBody: Kukiyoyi ƙananan fayilolin rubutu ne da aka adana akan na'urarku don taimakawa tunawa da abubuwan da kuka fi so.
cookies.whyTitle: Me yasa Muke Amfani da Kukiyoyi
cookies.whyItem1: Don tuna zaɓin harshe da ma'auni.
cookies.whyItem2: Don fahimtar amfani da inganta aiki.
cookies.adsBody: Google yana amfani da kukiyoyi don nuna tallace-tallace na musamman.
cookies.controlsBody: Kuna iya sarrafa kukiyoyi daga burauzar ku.

humidity.seoTitle: Danshi Bayani: Jin Daɗi da Lafiya | AtmosMind
humidity.seoDescription: Jagoran danshi: danshi na dangi vs ma'aunin raɓa, da dalilin da yasa iska mai danshi take jin zafi.
humidity.title: Jagoran Danshi: Abin da Yake Nufi da Dalilin da Yasa Yake Muhimmanci
humidity.p1: Danshi yana ɗaya daga cikin ma'aunin yanayi da aka fi yawan rashin fahimta. Birane biyu na iya samun zazzabi ɗaya amma suna jin daban-daban. Dalili shine tururin ruwa. Danshi na dangi (RH) ba kawai adadin ruwa ba ne, amma yadda iska take kusa da cikawa a wannan zazzabin. Iska mai zafi na iya ɗaukar ƙarin tururi fiye da iska mai sanyi.
humidity.p2: Ma'aunin raɓa sau da yawa shine mafi kyawun ma'aunin 'jin daɗin'. Shi ne zazzabin da iska take cikawa. Ma'aunin raɓa ƙasa da 10 °C yana da daɗi, yayin da sama da 20 °C iska take ji da ɗanko.
humidity.p3: Danshi yana shafar ikon jikinku na yin sanyi. Lokacin da iska take cike da danshi, gumi yana ƙafewa a hankali, don haka jikinku yana riƙe da zafi. Wannan shine dalilin da yasa kwanakin da danshi suke da yawa suke jin daɗi.
humidity.p4: A cikin gida, danshi yana shafar ingancin barci da rashin lafiya. Danshi mai ƙaranci yana busar da hanyoyin numfashi, yayin da danshi mai yawa yana ƙarfafa ƙura. Ku yi nufin 40-60%.
humidity.p5: Ku ɗauki danshi azaman siginar aiki. Idan yana da yawa, zaɓi yadudduka masu shaƙa kuma ku guje wa aiki mai nauyi a tsakiyar rana.

windChill.seoTitle: Jagoran Sanyin Iska: Dalilin da Yasa Iska Take Yi Sanyi | AtmosMind
windChill.seoDescription: Fahimci tasirin sanyin iska kuma ku koyi yadda ake yin tufafi daidai don yanayi mai iska da sanyi.
windChill.title: Jagoran Sanyin Iska: Tasirin 'Sanyi fiye da yadda aka Auna'
windChill.p1: Sanyin iska yana bayyana sanyin da kuke ji akan fatarku lokacin da iska take hanzarta asarar zafin jiki. Jikinku yana dumama wani ɗan ƙaramin yanki na iska kusa da fata; iska tana busar da wannan yadin kuma ta maye gurbinsa da iska mai sanyi.
windChill.p2: Wannan tasirin yana da mahimmanci a zazzabi ƙasa da 10 °C. A lokacin rani, iska na iya zama mai daɗi, amma a lokacin sanyi tana ƙara haɗarin daskarewa. Sanyin iska ya shafi fata da ba a rufe ba.
windChill.p3: Don tsare-tsarenku: Kariya daga iska sau da yawa tana da mahimmanci fiye da sutura mai kauri. Wurin waje mai hana iska yana dakatar da asarar zafi kuma yana barin rufinku yayi aiki.
windChill.p4: Iska mai ƙarfi da sanyi mai tsanani suna ƙara haɗarin rashin zafin jiki. Kariya ga hannuwa, ƙafafu, da kai shine fifiko. A kan gadoji da wuraren buɗe, iska takan fi ƙarfi.
windChill.p5: Ku yi amfani da sanyin iska azaman jagora. Idan iska tana da ƙarfi, ku yi tufafi a yadudduka kuma ku dogara ga ƙimar 'Ana ji kamar' a AtmosMind azaman jagorar aikinku.

whatToWear.seoTitle: Abin da za a Sa a Wannan Yanayi (Iska, Ruwan Sama, Zafi) | AtmosMind
whatToWear.seoDescription: Jagora mai amfani don zaɓin tufafi bisa iyakokin zazzabi da yanayin yanayi.
whatToWear.title: Jagoran Tufafi: Zafi, Iska, Ruwan Sama da Jin Daɗi
whatToWear.p1: 'Me zan sa yau?' - wannan ita ce tambayar yanayi mafi amfani. Kyakkyawar dabara tana farawa da yadudduka: yadi na ciki mai shaƙa, yadi mai rufi, da yadi na waje mai kariya.
whatToWear.p2: Dokokin yatsa: Sama da 25 °C: yadudduka masu sauƙi. 18-25 °C: T-shirt, yadi mai sauƙi don maraice. 12-18 °C: dogon hannu ko jaket mai sauƙi. 5-12 °C: suwaita mai dumi da jaket mai hana iska. Ƙasa da 5 °C: rufi mai ƙarfi, hula, da safofin hannu.
whatToWear.p3: Daidaitawa: Iska tana ƙara asarar zafi, don haka zaɓi tufafin da ke hana iska. Ruwan sama yana canza komai; rigar jika ba ta rufewa, don haka zaɓi yadi mai hana ruwa.
whatToWear.p4: Don tafiye-tafiye: 'Lokacin da aka kwashe a waje' shine ɓoyayyen abu. Fi son tufafi masu zik da yadudduka waɗanda zaku iya daidaitawa cikin sauƙi a cikin yini.
whatToWear.p5: Kada ku manta da takalma. A kwanakin ruwan sama, hana ruwa ya fi mahimmanci fiye da ƙarin suwaita. Yi amfani da shawarwarin AtmosMind don daidaita zaɓinku.

thunderstorm.seoTitle: Amincin Walƙiya: Nasihohi don Kasancewa cikin Aminci | AtmosMind
thunderstorm.seoDescription: Muhimman shawarwarin aminci don walƙiya da hadari. Ku koyi abin da za ku yi a ciki da waje.
thunderstorm.title: Amincin Walƙiya: Kariya Lokacin da Sama Ta Yi Duhu
thunderstorm.p1: Hadari na iya tasowa da sauri, yana kawo walƙiya, guguwar iska, da ruwan sama mai ƙarfi. Mafi kyawun dabara shine saka idanu akan hasashen kuma ku guje wa ayyukan waje lokacin da haɗarin hadari ke nan.
thunderstorm.p2: Walƙiya ita ce babban haɗari a waje. Idan kuna jin tsawa, kuna kusa da isa don walƙiya ta same ku. Ku shiga cikin gini ko mota mai rufi nan take.
thunderstorm.p3: Iska da ƙanƙara na iya haifar da lalacewa. Ku tsare abubuwan da suke kwance a farfajiya kafin hadari. Kada ku yi kiliya a ƙarƙashin bishiyoyi. Ku nemi mafaka idan ƙanƙara ta sauka.
thunderstorm.p4: Ruwan sama mai ƙarfi na iya haifar da ambaliya mai sauri. Kada ku taɓa tuƙi ta hanyoyin da ruwa ya mamaye; zurfin yana da wuyar ƙididdigewa kuma ruwan na iya tafiyar da mota.
thunderstorm.p5: Ku kasance da hankali bayan hadari (wayoyin lantarki da suka karye, rassan bishiyoyi). Yi amfani da binciken AI na AtmosMind don tsara ranar ku cikin aminci.

uvIndex.seoTitle: Jagoran UV Index: Kariyar Rana da Tsare-tsare | AtmosMind
uvIndex.seoDescription: Fahimci UV index kuma ku koyi yadda ake kare kanku daidai daga hasken rana.
uvIndex.title: Jagoran UV Index: Fahimtar Hasken Rana
uvIndex.p1: UV index yana auna ƙarfin hasken ultraviolet. Ba a ganinsa amma tasirinsa (ƙonawar rana, tsufan fata) na gaske ne. Yana iya zama mai girma ko da a ranakun sanyi.
uvIndex.p2: Sikeli: 0-2 (ƙananan), 3-5 (matsakaici), 6+ (babba). Yi amfani da kariya lokacin da index ya kai 3 ko sama. Rana tana da ƙarfi a kusa da tsakar rana.
uvIndex.p3: Gizagizai ba koyaushe suke toshe UV ba. Yashi, ruwa, da musamman ƙanƙara suna nuna haskoki, suna ƙara fallasa. Wannan yana da mahimmanci ga wasanni na hunturu.
uvIndex.p4: Kariya tana da sauƙi: ku nemi inuwa, ku sanya tabarau na rana, kuma ku rufe fata. Kariyar rana ya kamata a shafa da yawa kuma akai-akai.
uvIndex.p5: Yi amfani da UV index azaman kayan aiki na yau da kullun. Idan index yana da girma, ku tsara ayyukan waje don sassafe ko maraice.

messages.couldNotLoadForecastSummary: An kasa loda takaitaccen hasashen. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
messages.couldNotLoadAdvice: An kasa loda shawara. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.

contact.title: Tuntuɓi
contact.subtitle: Kuna da tambaya, ra'ayi, ko buƙatar taimako? Ku aiko mana da saƙo kuma za mu dawo gare ku.
contact.emailBody: Don buƙatun sirri, tambayoyin manufar AdSense, ko taimako na gabaɗaya, ku aiko mana da imel a:
contact.messagePlaceholder: Ku gaya mana yadda za mu iya taimaka…
contact.error: Ba mu iya aika saƙonku ba. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa daga baya.
contact.configError: Ba a saita fam ɗin tuntuɓi ba. Saita REACT_APP_EMAILJS_* da REACT_APP_ADMIN_CONTACT_MAIL a uwar garken.
contact.note: Ana isar da saƙonni cikin aminci ta EmailJS. Muna amfani da imel ɗinku kawai don amsa wannan tambaya.
